mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, day_number, title, description, hotel_name, shopping_center_name, shopping_exchange_info, shopping_info, sort_order, created_at FROM school_trip_itineraries WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, day_number ASC
SELECT id, product_id, day_number, title, description, hotel_name, shopping_center_name, shopping_exchange_info, shopping_info, sort_order, created_at FROM school_trip_itineraries WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO school_trip_itineraries ( product_id, day_number, title, description, hotel_name, shopping_center_name, shopping_exchange_info, shopping_info, sort_order, created_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{dayNumber}, #{title}, #{description}, #{hotelName}, #{shoppingCenterName}, #{shoppingExchangeInfo}, #{shoppingInfo}, #{sortOrder}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE school_trip_itineraries SET day_number = #{dayNumber}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, hotel_name = #{hotelName}, shopping_center_name = #{shoppingCenterName}, shopping_exchange_info = #{shoppingExchangeInfo}, shopping_info = #{shoppingInfo}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
